appearance.title: General
appearance.userAvatarDesc: Upload your photo to use as the chat user avatar

overview.title: Provider Accounts
overview.description: A summary of the provider accounts and models currently configured.

empty.title: No providers configured
empty.desc: Add an AI provider to start using MatchaClaw

dialog.title: Add AI Provider
dialog.desc: Configure a new AI model provider
dialog.apiKeyConfigured: An API key is already stored for this provider.
dialog.apiKeyMissing: No API key is stored for this provider yet.
dialog.apiKeyStored: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.
dialog.replaceApiKeyHelp: Leave this field empty if you want to keep the currently stored API key.

toast.minimaxConflict: Cannot add both MiniMax (Global) and MiniMax (CN) providers.

oauth.loginPrompt: This provider requires signing in via your browser.
oauth.browserFlowUnavailable: Browser OAuth is not wired for this provider yet.
oauth.step2: Open the login page in your browser.
oauth.step3: Paste the code to approve access.

license.title: License
license.description: Activate and manage your local license authorization

renewAlert.near_expiry_renew_failed: Renewal failed near expiry. Please revalidate as soon as possible

messages.cache_grace_valid: License validated by cached grace period
messages.network_error: Cannot reach license service, please check network and retry
messages.server_rejected: License was rejected by license service
messages.device_mismatch: License device does not match this machine

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Collect a local diagnostics bundle for troubleshooting

gateway.title: Runtime
gateway.description: Manage OpenClaw and Runtime Host status
gateway.runtimeDescription: Inspect OpenClaw and Runtime Host lifecycle and health.
gateway.openclawDescription: Inspect the OpenClaw process, port, and logs.
gateway.runtimeHostDescription: Inspect Runtime Host lifecycle and health.
gateway.proxyDesc: Route Electron and Gateway traffic through your local proxy client.
gateway.proxyServerHelp: Use one proxy server for all requests. Bare host:port values default to HTTP.
gateway.proxyBypassHelp: Semicolon, comma, or newline separated hosts that should connect directly.
gateway.proxyRestartNote: Saving reapplies Electron networking and restarts the Gateway immediately.

browser.title: Browser
browser.description: Choose which browser runtime path MatchaClaw should use
browser.modeDescription: Choose the active browser runtime path.
browser.modeSaving: Applying browser mode and restarting Gateway...

relay.title: Browser Relay
relay.description: Use the MatchaClaw Browser Relay plugin and browser extension.

native.title: Native Browser
native.description: Use OpenClaw's built-in browser plugin without the extension.

browser.nativeModeBody: MatchaClaw uses OpenClaw's built-in browser plugin and does not rely on the Browser Relay extension path.
browser.offModeBody: Neither the native Browser plugin nor Browser Relay will be enabled.

steps.enableDevModeTitle: Open Chrome Extensions and enable Developer mode
steps.enableDevModeBody: Open the Chrome extensions management page, then turn on the Developer mode toggle in the top-right corner.
steps.openFolderBody: Find the directory that contains the browser extension files. In development you can use the repository path below; in packaged builds you can use Reveal extension directory.
steps.installTitle: Drag the extension folder into Chrome
steps.installBody: Drag the browser-relay folder onto the chrome://extensions page and Chrome will install it immediately.
steps.installHint: If drag and drop is inconvenient, click Load unpacked and select this extension directory instead.

updates.title: Updates

status.check: Check for updates to get the latest features

toast.availableDescription: Version v{{version}} is available. Download it when you're ready.
toast.downloadedDescription: Version v{{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to install it.

updates.help: MatchaClaw checks for updates automatically and prompts you before downloading or installing.

transport.label: Gateway Transport Preference
transport.desc: Choose how renderer requests gateway RPC: WebSocket, HTTP proxy, or IPC fallback.

developer.title: Developer
developer.consoleDesc: Access the native OpenClaw management interface
developer.consoleNote: Opens the Control UI with gateway token injected
developer.gatewayTokenDesc: Paste this into Control UI settings if prompted
developer.cliDesc: Copy a command to run OpenClaw without modifying PATH.
developer.installDetail: This will create ~/.local/bin/openclaw. Ensure ~/.local/bin is on your PATH if you want to run it globally.

capabilityRouting.title: Default Models
capabilityRouting.description: Pick which credential/model handles chat, image, video, music, and TTS.
capabilityRouting.fallbacksHelp: Tried in order when the primary model is unavailable.
capabilityRouting.timeoutHelp: Default request timeout for media generation; per-call timeoutMs still wins.

errors.invalidPrimary: Primary model must be credential/model, e.g. openai/gpt-image-2
errors.invalidTimeout: Timeout must be a positive integer in milliseconds
errors.invalidProviderKey: providerKey only allows letters, digits, dot, underscore, hyphen

tts.title: Text-to-Speech
tts.description: Maps to messages.tts.provider; voice/style still requires editing openclaw.json directly.

providerModels.title: Model catalog
providerModels.description: Manage model IDs under each credential. Runtime adapters write them to openclaw.json as models.providers.<providerKey>.models[].

codePlan.title: Ark Code Plan
codePlan.description: Add ark-code-latest to the ark model catalog. Configure the Ark API key and coding base URL on the provider card.

create.title: Add a new credential model
create.help: Models are added inside an existing provider credential.

errors.invalidEntry: Model "{{id}}" is invalid: context/maxTokens/timeoutMs must be positive integers
errors.invalidKey: credentialId only allows letters, digits, dot, underscore, hyphen
